question:
Translate the following English text into German. Provide ONLY the German translation without any additional explanation.

Text: The advancement of artificial intelligence has transformed how we approach complex problem-solving in modern society.
answer: Der Fortschritt der künstlichen Intelligenz hat die Art und Weise verändert, wie wir komplexe Problemlösungen in der modernen Gesellschaft angehen.
